nasb.text: Her princes within her are roaring lions, Her judges are wolves at evening; They leave nothing for the morning.

esv.text: Her officials within her are roaring lions; her judges are evening wolves that leave nothing till the morning.

cnv.text: 城中的領袖都是咆哮的獅子， 城中的審判官是夜間的豺狼， 甚麼都不留到早晨。

ccb.text: 她的首领是咆哮的狮子， 她的审判官是夜间的豺狼， 不留一点猎物到天明。
